query: vaginal stenosis brachytherapy cervical cancer management guidelines

results.title: Vaginal Stenosis After Gender-affirming Vaginoplasty: A Systematic Review.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 38364980. 2024/04/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Vaginal stenosis (VS) is a common side effect of pelvic radiotherapy 
for gynecological cancer in women. It has a high incidence variability, likely 
due to unstandardized and subjective assessment methods. Furthermore, even 
though the worldwide standard treatment for VS is vaginal dilation, low 
compliance rates have been noted.
AIM: To evaluate the parameters used to diagnose VS and to assess whether the 
lack of an objective measure of VS ha
